# platformSecretsSet

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformSecretsSet

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformSecretsSetMutation(); mutate({ input: { secretName: '<String>', secretValue: '<String>', algo: '<String>', secretNamespace: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformSecretsSetMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformSecretsSetMutation();
mutate({ input: { secretName: '<String>', secretValue: '<String>', algo: '<String>', secretNamespace: '<String>' } });
```
